summary: Iter 60 verification — ALL GREEN. Backend regression: 5/5 endpoints HTTP 200 (GET /api/dashboard/news?limit=2, GET /api/dashboard/competition, GET /api/sources/demo, POST /api/location/analyze, POST /api/sources/demo/lock + /unlock). Frontend: (A) Brand rename verified — nav reads 'Propcycle.' on every page, <title> 'Propcycle — The Operating System for Hospitality Assets', no 'PropOS' substring in / nor /operate result nor /portfolio/demo nor /dashboard/demo nor /invest/asset/demo HTML. (B) Landing: hero headline 'Hospitality assets, finally on one operating system.' renders, subtitle 'Analyze what to buy. Optimize what you own. Execute what improves revenue.', support text mentions Propcycle, font sizes visibly reduced (clamp 34px→64px), both CTAs px-6 py-3 sized. (C) Operate restructure verified — clicked operate-demo-btn → waited 11s cinematic → operate-opener-continue-btn → result page shows NEW [data-testid=operate-market-position-hero] as the first block with ALL required sub-elements: operate-hero-image, operate-hero-title, operate-hero-score (=60), operate-hero-verdict (='Below Market'), operate-hero-finding, all 4 markers (avg/top/target/current), operate-hero-gap, operate-hero-close-gap-btn, operate-hero-location-pill. OLD components confirmed REMOVED: operate-result-hero, operate-result-finding, operate-result-keycards, operate-result-market-position all null. Rest of flow intact: operate-result-nba → operate-result-top-fixes → operate-result-simulator → operate-result-action-plan → operate-result-details. Close-the-Gap modal opens with close-gap-build-plan-btn; loc-details-modal opens from location pill. (D) Portfolio rebuild verified — portfolio-kicker='Portfolio · Live Market Position', portfolio-title='Your assets, against the market.', portfolio-market-pulse visible with 4 live news items (GREEK REPORTER / GTP HEADLINES), portfolio-aggregate-position shows empty state 'Add scored assets to see your aggregate market position.' (rows=0), portfolio-assets section with portfolio-empty state, portfolio-add-asset-btn rendered. Old terminal-style 'DECISION_THEME' and 'Market Open' confirmed absent. (E) Dashboard intact (dashboard-summary, dashboard-news, dashboard-competition all visible). (F) Invest intact — invest-location-pill present, invest-section-location absent (correctly removed in iter59), invest-decision-strip present. (G) Action Impact Simulator live update verified: €+14,148 → €+16,848 after 10× ArrowRight on simulator-adr-input.
critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio.jsx uses raw axios with `${process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api` while elsewhere `api` lib is used — minor inconsistency, consider unifying.
MarketPositionHero.jsx unused import: TrendingUp is imported but only ArrowRight, MapPin, Compass, ArrowUpRight, X are used directly — verify lucide tree-shaking is enabled (minor).
neighborhoodBaseline cohort_avg=72/cohort_top=86 are hardcoded constants — flagged in mocked_apis_list, OK until AirDNA wires in.
OperateResult.jsx is now lean (~70 lines) — good cleanup compared to the prior 8-section layout.
seed_data_creation: None. Sources lock/unlock roundtrip via curl used field='test_field_60' and was unlocked in same run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 60 fully green. Brand is now Propcycle (no PropOS anywhere user-facing). New unified Operate result hero testid=operate-market-position-hero replaces previous 4 components (operate-result-hero, operate-result-finding, operate-result-keycards, operate-result-market-position — ALL removed). Hero sub-testids: operate-hero-{image,title,score,verdict,finding,marker-avg,marker-top,marker-target,marker-current,gap,close-gap-btn,location-pill}. Close-gap modal: close-gap-modal + close-gap-modal-close + close-gap-build-plan-btn. Portfolio fully rebuilt: portfolio-{page,kicker,title,market-pulse,pulse-item-N,aggregate-position,assets,empty,add-asset-btn,asset-card-<id>}. Operate cinematic timing unchanged (~10s wait for opener-continue-btn). Simulator unchanged (annual delta initial €+14,148, +€2,700 after 10× ArrowRight on ADR slider).
